title: NEW Hermes Agent v0.17.0 is INSANE
summary: Hermes Agent v0.17.0, called "The Reach Release," is an open-source agent framework that integrates across applications with a new Blank Slate setup mode that lets users start with minimal configuration and add only needed features. The release includes iMessage integration, background sub-agents, persistent memory, and desktop upgrades.
writeup: The video covers Hermes Agent v0.17.0, named "The Reach Release," an open-source agent framework that integrates across applications. The central addition is a Blank Slate setup mode that starts with minimal configuration and adds only the features a user needs. Other items in the release include iMessage integration, background sub-agents, persistent memory, and desktop upgrades, pointing toward multi-agent workflow automation across connected apps.
